targets.rawSql:
WITH latest AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (device_name)
    device_name,
    time,
    temperature,
    humidity,
    EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW() - time)) / 60.0 AS delay_min
  FROM telemetry
  ORDER BY device_name, time DESC
),
scored AS (
  SELECT
    device_name,
    CASE
      WHEN delay_min <= 2 THEN 100
      WHEN delay_min <= 5 THEN 70
      WHEN delay_min <= 10 THEN 40
      ELSE 0
    END AS freshness_score,
    CASE
      WHEN temperature BETWEEN 22 AND 28 THEN 100
      WHEN temperature BETWEEN 20 AND 30 THEN 60
      ELSE 20
    END AS temperature_score
  FROM latest
)
SELECT
  ROUND(AVG(freshness_score * 0.5 + temperature_score * 0.5)::numeric, 1) AS overall_health_score
FROM scored;

panels.description: Current anomalous devices out of total monitored sensors

targets.rawSql:
WITH latest AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (device_name)
    device_name,
    time,
    temperature,
    EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW() - time)) / 60.0 AS delay_min
  FROM telemetry
  ORDER BY device_name, time DESC
)
SELECT
  COUNT(*) AS active_anomaly_count
FROM latest
WHERE temperature > 30
   OR temperature < 20
   OR delay_min > 5;

panels.title: Active Anomalies

targets.rawSql:
WITH latest AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (device_name)
    device_name,
    time,
    ROUND((EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW() - time)) / 60.0)::numeric, 0) AS delay_min
  FROM telemetry
  ORDER BY device_name, time DESC
)
SELECT
  delay_min
FROM latest
ORDER BY delay_min DESC
LIMIT 1;

WITH latest AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (device_name)
    device_name,
    time,
    EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW() - time)) / 60.0 AS delay_min
  FROM telemetry
  ORDER BY device_name, time DESC
)
SELECT
  COUNT(*) AS offline_count
FROM latest
WHERE delay_min > 5;

WITH latest AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (device_name)
    device_name,
    time,
    temperature,
    humidity,
    EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW() - time)) / 60.0 AS delay_min
  FROM telemetry
  ORDER BY device_name, time DESC
),
scored AS (
  SELECT
    device_name,
    time,
    temperature,
    humidity,
    delay_min,

    CASE
      WHEN delay_min <= 2 THEN 100
      WHEN delay_min <= 5 THEN 70
      WHEN delay_min <= 10 THEN 40
      ELSE 0
    END AS freshness_score,

    CASE
      WHEN temperature BETWEEN 22 AND 28 THEN 100
      WHEN temperature BETWEEN 20 AND 30 THEN 60
      ELSE 20
    END AS temperature_score
  FROM latest
)
SELECT
  device_name,
  time AS last_seen,
  ROUND(temperature::numeric, 2) AS temperature,
  ROUND(humidity::numeric, 2) AS humidity,
  ROUND(delay_min::numeric, 0) AS delay_min,

  ROUND((freshness_score * 0.5 + temperature_score * 0.5)::numeric, 1) AS health_score,

  CASE
    WHEN delay_min > 10 THEN 'OFFLINE'
    WHEN delay_min > 5 THEN 'CRITICAL'
    WHEN temperature > 30 OR temperature < 20 THEN 'CRITICAL'
    WHEN delay_min > 2 OR temperature BETWEEN 28 AND 30 OR temperature BETWEEN 20 AND 22 THEN 'WARNING'
    ELSE 'ONLINE'
  END AS smart_status

FROM scored
ORDER BY
  CASE
    WHEN delay_min > 5 THEN 3
    WHEN temperature > 30 OR temperature < 20 THEN 2
    WHEN delay_min > 2 THEN 1
    ELSE 0
  END DESC,
  delay_min DESC;

WITH ranked AS (
  SELECT
    device_name,
    time,
    temperature,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY device_name ORDER BY time DESC) AS rn
  FROM telemetry
),
last_two AS (
  SELECT
    device_name,
    MAX(CASE WHEN rn = 1 THEN temperature END) AS t1,
    MAX(CASE WHEN rn = 2 THEN temperature END) AS t2
  FROM ranked
  WHERE rn <= 2
  GROUP BY device_name
)
SELECT
  device_name,
  ROUND((t1 + (t1 - t2))::numeric, 1) AS predicted_temp
FROM last_two
ORDER BY predicted_temp DESC
LIMIT 10;

WITH latest AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (device_name)
    device_name,
    time,
    temperature,
    EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW() - time)) / 60.0 AS delay_min
  FROM telemetry
  ORDER BY device_name, time DESC
),
scored AS (
  SELECT
    device_name,
    (
      CASE
        WHEN delay_min <= 2 THEN 100
        WHEN delay_min <= 5 THEN 85
        WHEN delay_min <= 10 THEN 70
        WHEN delay_min <= 15 THEN 55
        ELSE 35
      END
      +
      CASE
        WHEN temperature BETWEEN 24 AND 26 THEN 100
        WHEN temperature BETWEEN 22 AND 28 THEN 85
        WHEN temperature BETWEEN 20 AND 30 THEN 65
        ELSE 40
      END
    ) / 2.0 AS health_score
  FROM latest
)
SELECT
  device_name,
  ROUND(health_score::numeric, 1) AS health_score
FROM scored
ORDER BY health_score ASC, device_name
LIMIT 10;

WITH latest AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (device_name)
    device_name,
    time,
    EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW() - time)) / 60.0 AS delay_min
  FROM telemetry
  ORDER BY device_name, time DESC
)
SELECT
  device_name,
  ROUND(
    EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW() - time)) / 60.0
    + row_number() OVER (ORDER BY time) * 0.2,
    1
  ) AS delay_min
FROM latest
ORDER BY delay_min DESC
LIMIT 10;

SELECT
  time AS "time",
  temperature,
  device_name
FROM telemetry
WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
ORDER BY device_name , time;

WITH base AS (
  SELECT
    time,
    device_name,
    temperature,
    AVG(temperature) OVER (
      PARTITION BY device_name
      ORDER BY time
      ROWS BETWEEN 4 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW
    ) AS ma_5,
    AVG(temperature) OVER (
      PARTITION BY device_name
      ORDER BY time
      ROWS BETWEEN 14 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW
    ) AS ma_15
  FROM telemetry
  WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
)
SELECT
  time AS "time",
  device_name,
  temperature,
  ma_5,
  ma_15
FROM base
ORDER BY time;

WITH latest AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (device_name)
    device_name,
    time,
    temperature
  FROM telemetry
  ORDER BY device_name, time DESC
)
SELECT
  device_name AS "Device",
  ROUND(temperature::numeric, 1) AS "Temp (°C)",
  CASE
    WHEN temperature > 30 THEN 'CRITICAL'
    WHEN temperature >= 28 THEN 'WARNING'
    ELSE 'NORMAL'
  END AS "Status"
FROM latest
ORDER BY temperature DESC;

WITH latest AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (device_name)
    device_name,
    time,
    EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW() - time)) / 60.0 AS delay_min
  FROM telemetry
  ORDER BY device_name, time DESC
)
SELECT
  device_name,
  ROUND(delay_min::numeric, 1) AS delay_min
FROM latest
WHERE delay_min > 5
ORDER BY delay_min DESC;

WITH latest AS ( 
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (device_name)
    device_name,
    time,
    temperature,
    EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW() - time)) / 60.0 AS delay_min
  FROM telemetry
  ORDER BY device_name, time DESC
)
SELECT
  device_name,
  ROUND(temperature::numeric, 1) AS temperature,
  ROUND(delay_min::numeric, 1) AS delay_min,
  CASE
    WHEN delay_min > 10 THEN 'OFFLINE'
    WHEN delay_min > 5 THEN 'CRITICAL_DELAY'
    WHEN temperature > 30 OR temperature < 20 THEN 'CRITICAL_TEMP'
    ELSE 'OK'
  END AS issue_type,
  CASE
    WHEN delay_min > 15 THEN 'CRITICAL'
    WHEN delay_min > 10 THEN 'WARNING'
    ELSE 'OK'
  END AS severity
FROM latest
WHERE delay_min > 5 OR temperature > 30 OR temperature < 20
ORDER BY delay_min DESC;

WITH ranked AS (
  SELECT
    device_name,
    time,
    temperature,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY device_name ORDER BY time DESC) AS rn
  FROM telemetry
),
last_two AS (
  SELECT
    device_name,
    MAX(CASE WHEN rn = 1 THEN temperature END) AS t1,
    MAX(CASE WHEN rn = 2 THEN temperature END) AS t2
  FROM ranked
  WHERE rn <= 2
  GROUP BY device_name
)
SELECT
  device_name,
  ROUND((t1 + (t1 - t2))::numeric,1) AS predicted_temp
FROM last_two
WHERE (t1 + (t1 - t2)) > 28
ORDER BY predicted_temp DESC;

WITH latest AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (device_name)
    device_name,
    EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW() - time)) / 60.0 AS delay_min
  FROM telemetry
  ORDER BY device_name, time DESC
),
scored AS (
  SELECT
    device_name,
    CASE
      WHEN delay_min <= 5 THEN 100
      WHEN delay_min <= 30 THEN 80
      WHEN delay_min <= 60 THEN 60
      WHEN delay_min <= 120 THEN 40
      WHEN delay_min <= 240 THEN 20
      ELSE 0
    END AS health_score
  FROM latest
)
SELECT ROUND(AVG(health_score), 1) AS system_health
FROM scored;

WITH ranked AS (
  SELECT
    device_name,
    time,
    temperature,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY device_name ORDER BY time DESC) AS rn
  FROM telemetry
),
last_two AS (
  SELECT
    device_name,
    MAX(CASE WHEN rn = 1 THEN temperature END) AS current_temp,
    MAX(CASE WHEN rn = 2 THEN temperature END) AS previous_temp,
    MAX(CASE WHEN rn = 1 THEN time END) AS latest_time
  FROM ranked
  WHERE rn <= 2
  GROUP BY device_name
),
recovery_check AS (
  SELECT
    device_name,
    current_temp,
    previous_temp,
    EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW() - latest_time)) / 60.0 AS delay_min
  FROM last_two
)
SELECT
  device_name,
  ROUND(current_temp::numeric, 1) AS current_temp,
  ROUND(previous_temp::numeric, 1) AS previous_temp,
  ROUND(delay_min::numeric, 1) AS delay_min,
  CASE
    WHEN delay_min > 60 THEN 'CRITICAL_STALE'
    WHEN delay_min > 30 THEN 'STALE'
    WHEN delay_min > 5 THEN 'WARNING'
    ELSE 'FRESH'
  END AS freshness_status,
  CASE
    WHEN previous_temp IS NULL OR current_temp IS NULL THEN 'INSUFFICIENT_DATA'
    WHEN previous_temp > 30 AND current_temp <= 30 THEN 'RECOVERED'
    WHEN previous_temp < 20 AND current_temp >= 20 THEN 'RECOVERED'
    WHEN current_temp < previous_temp THEN 'COOLING'
    WHEN current_temp > previous_temp THEN 'RISING'
    ELSE 'STABLE'
  END AS recovery_status
FROM recovery_check
ORDER BY delay_min DESC;

SELECT
  frequency_hz,
  CASE
    WHEN frequency_hz BETWEEN 0.9 AND 1.1 THEN 0.8
    WHEN frequency_hz BETWEEN 2.8 AND 3.2 THEN 0.6
    ELSE RANDOM() * 0.1
  END AS amplitude
FROM generate_series(0, 5, 0.1) AS frequency_hz
ORDER BY frequency_hz;

SELECT
  time AS "time",
  temperature
FROM telemetry
WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
  AND device_name = 'sensor_01'
ORDER BY time

SELECT
  temperature::double precision AS temperature,
  humidity::double precision AS humidity,
  EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM time) AS point_order
FROM telemetry
WHERE device_name = 'sensor_01'
  AND $__timeFilter(time)
  AND temperature IS NOT NULL
  AND humidity IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY time

SELECT
  temperature,
  humidity,
  EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (time - MIN(time) OVER ())) AS time_sec
FROM telemetry
WHERE device_name = 'sensor_01'
ORDER BY time;
